title: Link layer transmit/receive logic
description:
Implement link layer TX/RX integration.

LinkLayer class:
- __init__(radio: Radio, identity: Identity)
- async send(dst_addr, payload, security_level) -> bool
- async receive(timeout_ms) -> Frame | None
- Uses Schnorr signer for outgoing frames
- Uses ReplayProtector for incoming frames
- Tracks own sequence numbers

TX flow:
1. Build frame header
2. Sign frame (header + payload)
3. Call radio.transmit()
4. Increment seqnum

RX flow:
1. Call radio.receive()
2. Parse frame
3. Verify signature
4. Check replay protection
5. Return payload

Integration with SimRadio for testing.
close_reason: Implemented upstream in python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py (LinkLayer: Schnorr sign on TX, verify + ReplayProtector on RX, RxFrame). tests/link/test_link_layer.py.
